welcomeBody: Create one local password for this device. AccordMesh has no cloud account and cannot recover this password.
noRecovery: I understand that resetting the vault permanently deletes AccordMesh-managed local data. Files exported outside AccordMesh remain.
chooseMock: Start with MockProvider for local testing
demoMode: Mock demo mode. This browser session is temporary and does not use the encrypted desktop vault. Provider credentials are unavailable here.
resetWarning: This permanently deletes AccordMesh-managed local data on this device, including meetings, media, settings, and provider credentials. Files exported outside AccordMesh remain. It cannot be undone.
resetImpactProjects: All meeting projects, transcripts, analyses, minutes, comparisons, and managed media
resetImpactCredentials: All provider credentials, provider settings, and encryption keys
resetImpactSettings: All local preferences, processing history, jobs, and runtime state
resetChecking: Checking that no meeting, processing task, or local file operation is active…
resetActiveWorkBody: AccordMesh will not interrupt active work. Stop meetings, wait for cleanup, and finish or cancel background tasks before trying again.
resetAcknowledgement: I understand that this action is irreversible and that AccordMesh cannot recover the deleted data.
resetFailClosedHint: Reset begins only when AccordMesh is idle. It prepares a fresh empty data area first; if the filesystem swap cannot complete safely, the existing data is preserved and the app remains locked.
resetRecoveryRequired: AccordMesh found an interrupted reset that must be recovered at startup. Restart the app before trying again.
resetImpactExports: Exports previously saved outside AccordMesh remain on the device and are not deleted.
resetOperationBusySingle: 1 local operation is still in progress. Finish it before resetting the vault.
resetOperationBusyPlural: {{count}} local operations are still in progress. Finish them before resetting the vault.
resetAlreadyInProgress: Reset Vault is already in progress. Wait for AccordMesh to finish.
createBody: Create one local password for this device. AccordMesh has no cloud account and cannot recover this password.
unlockBody: Enter the local password that unlocks the encrypted vault on this device.
